best_window: Early morning to late morning before wind builds
report_text: Viz is currently sitting around 10-14 ft. Primary swell is around 1.1 ft @ 12s from SSW, so there should be manageable movement around the reef. Wind gets into the 12 mph range, so the afternoon surface may get messy. Workable, but expect some haze and pick your entry carefully. Stay safe out there divers.
